title: Source Origin
description: Source Origin v1 contract for raw material provenance before intake, QC, lot readiness, traceability, and recall.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 Source Zone -> Source Origin chain and PACK-03 source/material catalog. TODO: exact source type taxonomy is not finalized.

source_type.description: Source type such as company source or supplier source. TODO: define official values.

supplier_id.description: Linked supplier when the source is supplier-owned.

trace_required.description: Whether this source must be traceable into raw material lot and recall chain.
